name: ch24-opener-agent-orchestra
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A cartoon orchestra of friendly robots, each playing a different instrument (violin, drums, trumpet, cello, flute). A conductor robot stands on a podium, waving a baton to coordinate them all. Musical notes float in the air forming a harmonious pattern. The scene represents multi-agent orchestration where different specialized agents work together under coordination. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch24-architecture-patterns
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: Three panels showing different multi-agent architecture patterns as building layouts. First panel: a star pattern with one boss robot in the center sending instructions to four worker robots around it (hub and spoke). Second panel: robots arranged in a circle passing messages to their neighbors in sequence (pipeline). Third panel: robots arranged in a mesh, all connected to each other with crossing lines (fully connected). Each layout is drawn like a simple floor plan viewed from above. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch24-sycophantic-convergence
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A humorous scene of a panel of five robot judges at a table. Four of them are looking at each other and copying the same thumbs-up gesture, while one brave robot in the corner holds up a thumbs-down but looks nervous and uncertain. Thought bubbles above the conforming robots show them peeking at each other's answers. The dissenting robot has a thought bubble showing genuine analysis. The scene humorously illustrates sycophantic convergence in multi-agent voting. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch24-shared-memory-whiteboard
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: Several friendly robots gathered around a large shared whiteboard. Each robot has a different colored marker and is writing or reading from different sections of the board. One robot is erasing something another just wrote, looking apologetic, illustrating a race condition. A small traffic light nearby shows how access coordination works. The whiteboard represents shared state in multi-agent systems, and the scene shows both the power and the risk of shared memory. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch24-human-in-loop
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A friendly human sitting in a comfortable chair at a control panel with a big green APPROVE button and a red REJECT button. A conveyor belt brings decisions from a team of small worker robots. Each decision sits on the belt as a colorful package. The human inspects each one, occasionally pressing the green button to let it through or the red button to send it back. Some packages have a gold star (auto-approved for low risk), showing that not every decision needs human review. The scene illustrates human-in-the-loop oversight of agent systems. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.
